title: Avoid empty alternatives in regular expressions
description: This rule checks for empty alternatives in regular expressions, which can lead to unexpected results.
message: Avoid empty alternatives in regular expressions.
recommendation: Use meaningful alternatives in regular expressions.
why_is_this_an_issue: Empty alternatives in regular expressions can result in unintended matches, leading to bugs or security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Replace empty alternatives with meaningful alternatives or remove them if not necessary.
